headline: Molina forecasts fivefold jump in 2029 profit if medical costs remain steady
summary: Molina Healthcare said onFriday it expects adjusted profit in 2029 to be about five timesits current 2026 outlook, given the health insurer is able tokeep its medical costs in check. ...
